name: Triple threat
description:
A FATAL CONFLICT.

My head hurts after making this.

Anyways, I'm back again from 1000Yr slumber to make another bot and this time being my first attempt at a mutiple char bot.

So don't expect it to be good or perfect.

The bot is based on the balancing nightmare of a transfur game and a game I played frequently back then, the game known as TRANSFUR OUTBREAK.

The bot is focused on some of the op dominuses you can find in the map of T.O, those being:

MESSOR

ASTRA

AUREUS

So, you can either fuck em all, date em or kill em, up to you. Just enjoy what I cook up. It's fine if you don't.

Also be warned this does contain topics related to dead dove. So if you don't like that stuff, then do move onto the next bot.

Little edit idk: I was not expecting for this bot to sorta blow up. Honestly, thank you all for checking out my bot, thank you really.

So I sorts hesitated to make this bot due to it's pfp, the pfp in question being my ex older art she made for me per request by me. I just felt bad for using her art she made for me, on a bit. So if I change the pfp or just private the bot. You know why.

Ignore this. TAGS: FURRY, BIG THIGHS, ROBLOX, TRANSFUR, TRANSFUR OUTBREAK, BOOBS, CURVY, DEAD DOVE, DOMINANT, LATEX, ANAL, ACTION
